de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration

Class FieldSpecification

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement

            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration.FieldSpecification
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Field, Member, ProgramModelElement, Variable, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ImplicitFieldSpecification

    public class FieldSpecification
extends VariableSpecification
implements Field

        type - the Type of this field

      • FieldSpecification

        public FieldSpecification(ProgramVariable var,
                  Expression init,
                  Type type)
        Field specification.
        Parameters:
        var - the ProgramVariable representing this concrete field
        init - the Expression the field is initialised with.
        type - the Type of this field

      • FieldSpecification

        public FieldSpecification(ProgramVariable var,
                  int dimensions,
                  Expression init,
                  Type type)
        Field specification.
        Parameters:
        var - the ProgramVariable representing this concrete field
        dimensions - an int defining the dimension
        init - the Expression the field is initialised with.
        type - the Type of this field

      • FieldSpecification

        public FieldSpecification(ExtList children,
                  ProgramVariable var,
                  int dimensions,
                  Type type)
        Field specification.
        Parameters:
        children - an ExtList with the children. May contain: an Expression (as initializer of the variable) a ProgramElementName (as name of the variable) a Comment
        var - the ProgramVariable representing this concrete field
        dimensions - an int defining the dimension
        type - the Type of this field

    • Method Detail

      • getProgramName

        public String getProgramName()
        returns the name of the field as used in programs. In the logic each field has a unique name which is composed by the class name where it is declared and its source code name
        Specified by:
        getProgramName in interface Field
        Returns:
        returns the name of the field as used in programs
